flows.name: Complete Order-to-Payment Flow
flows.description: End-to-end flow from waiter taking an order to customer paying the bill. Involves waiter, chef, and waiter again.

steps.action: Waiter taps on an available table from the Table Map
steps.result: System opens Create Order screen pre-filled with selected table

steps.action: Waiter browses menu, selects items, adjusts quantities, adds special notes
steps.result: Order summary updates in real-time with running total

steps.action: Waiter taps Submit Order
steps.result: Order is saved with status 'pending' and sent to Kitchen Display

steps.action: Chef sees new order appear in Kitchen Order Queue with items and special notes
steps.result: Order card appears with 'pending' status and timer starts

steps.action: Chef taps 'Start Cooking' on the order card
steps.result: Order status changes to 'cooking', waiter is notified

steps.action: Chef taps on a menu item name to view recipe guide if needed
steps.result: Recipe Viewer opens showing ingredients, steps, and cooking time

steps.action: Chef taps 'Mark Ready' when food is prepared
steps.result: Order status changes to 'ready', waiter receives notification

steps.action: Waiter sees order status changed to 'ready' in Order List
steps.result: Order card shows green 'Siap' badge

steps.action: Waiter serves food to customer and marks order as 'served'
steps.result: Order status updates to 'served'

steps.action: Waiter opens Payment Screen for the table, inputs amount received via numpad
steps.result: System shows itemized bill, calculates change automatically

steps.action: Waiter confirms payment and taps Print Receipt
steps.result: Transaction recorded, receipt printed, order status set to 'paid', table becomes available, stock auto-deducted

flows.name: Menu & Recipe Setup
flows.description: Owner adds a new menu item and creates its recipe guide with ingredients linked to inventory.
flows.trigger: Owner wants to add a new dish to the menu

steps.action: Owner navigates to Menu Management and taps 'Add New Item'
steps.result: Menu item form modal opens

steps.action: Owner fills in name, price, category, description, uploads image, sets availability to on
steps.result: Menu item is saved and appears in the menu list

steps.action: Owner navigates to Recipe Management and taps 'Add New Recipe'
steps.result: Recipe editor form opens

steps.action: Owner selects the menu item, adds ingredients from inventory with quantities, writes step-by-step cooking instructions, sets cooking time
steps.result: Recipe is saved and linked to the menu item. Ingredients are linked to inventory for auto-deduction.

flows.name: Inventory Restock & Monitoring
flows.description: Owner checks stock levels, sees low stock alerts, and restocks items.
flows.trigger: Owner sees low stock notification on dashboard or checks inventory

steps.action: Owner sees low stock alert cards on Dashboard showing items below threshold
steps.result: Alert cards display item name, current qty, and threshold

steps.action: Owner navigates to Inventory and reviews stock levels, filters by low stock
steps.result: Table shows all items with low/critical badges highlighted

steps.action: Owner taps on an item and selects 'Restock'
steps.result: Restock modal opens with quantity input

steps.action: Owner inputs restock quantity and confirms
steps.result: Stock updated, movement logged in history, alert cleared if above threshold

flows.name: User Creation & Access Configuration
flows.description: Owner creates a new staff account and configures their module access via permission checklist.
flows.trigger: New staff member joins or existing permissions need adjustment

steps.action: Owner navigates to User & Access Control and taps 'Add User'
steps.result: User creation form modal opens

steps.action: Owner fills in display name, username, password, selects role (waiter-cashier or chef)
steps.result: User account is created with default role permissions

steps.action: Owner taps on the new user and opens Permission Checklist Panel
steps.result: Checklist shows all toggleable permissions with defaults pre-set based on role

steps.action: Owner toggles specific permissions on/off (e.g., enables View Stock and View Recipe for this waiter)
steps.result: Custom permissions saved. User can now access those modules on next login.

flows.name: Login & Dashboard Hub Navigation
flows.description: User logs in and arrives at Main Dashboard Hub, then selects role-appropriate module to enter.

steps.action: User enters username and password on Login Screen
steps.result: System validates credentials

steps.action: System routes ALL users to Main Dashboard Hub
steps.result: Dashboard shows role-appropriate menu cards: cashier sees Open Shift/POS/Close Shift/Atur Menu/Cek Stok, chef sees Kitchen Display/Resep/Cek Stok, owner sees all modules

steps.action: User taps on desired module card to enter that section
steps.result: User navigates to the selected screen. Can always return to Dashboard Hub via logo/home button.

flows.name: Insufficient Stock Warning
flows.description: System prevents or warns when an order would deplete stock below zero.
flows.trigger: Waiter submits an order containing items with insufficient stock

steps.action: Waiter selects menu items and taps Submit Order
steps.result: System checks stock levels against recipe ingredients

steps.action: System detects insufficient stock for one or more ingredients
steps.result: Warning dialog appears showing which items have low/no stock. Waiter can proceed or modify order.

flows.name: Full Cashier Journey: Prep → Open Shift → Operations → Close Shift
flows.description: Complete cashier daily journey from login through preparation, PIN-verified shift opening, operational period, to one-way closing session with mandatory reconciliation.
flows.trigger: Cashier arrives to start their work day

steps.action: PIC Cashier prepares physical cash (modal) for restaurant operations, then logs into the POS application
steps.result: Routed to Main Dashboard Hub (S-016)

steps.action: Cashier sees Dashboard Hub with menu options. Before opening shift, cashier can do pre-opening preparation: tap 'Atur Menu' to check/update menu availability, tap 'Cek Stok' to verify inventory levels
steps.result: Cashier ensures menu and stock are ready for the day

steps.action: When ready to start operations, cashier taps 'Buka Kasir (Open Shift)'
steps.result: Open Shift screen (S-014) is displayed

steps.action: Cashier enters their 4-6 digit PIN via numpad for identity verification
steps.result: PIN verified. Opening balance input becomes accessible.

steps.action: Cashier counts physical cash and inputs the opening balance (modal awal operasional) via numpad
steps.result: Amount displayed in Rupiah format

steps.action: Cashier confirms to start the shift
steps.result: Shift opened. System records opening balance, PIC, and start time. Cashier is routed to POS operational interface (S-002) with active shift indicator in header.

steps.action: During shift, cashier processes orders, manages tables, and handles payments as normal
steps.result: All cash and digital transactions are tracked under this shift. Shift status bar visible in header.

steps.action: At end of operations, cashier taps shift status bar and selects Close Shift. System shows confirmation: 'Anda tidak bisa kembali ke operasional setelah memulai closing.'
steps.result: ONE-WAY closing session begins. Navigation back to operations is completely disabled.

steps.action: Cashier reviews shift summary: duration, total transactions, cash vs digital breakdown, opening balance, expected cash total
steps.result: All figures displayed clearly

steps.action: Cashier taps 'Print Laporan Transaksi' to print the detailed line-by-line transaction report
steps.result: Report printed showing each transaction with time, order ID, items, amount, and payment method. Cashier uses this to physically trace and verify cash.

steps.action: Cashier counts physical cash in register and enters actual amount via numpad
steps.result: System calculates discrepancy (actual - expected) and shows color-coded indicator

steps.action: If discrepancy is GREEN (match ±Rp1000): cashier confirms and closes shift. If YELLOW/RED (discrepancy exists): notes field appears as MANDATORY — cashier must type explanation of the discrepancy.
steps.result: Close button enabled only when conditions are met (no discrepancy, or discrepancy with notes filled)

steps.action: Cashier confirms and closes the shift
steps.result: Shift permanently closed and locked. All data immutable. Cashier returns to Main Dashboard Hub (S-016). Summary available for owner audit.

flows.name: Kitchen Ready → Waiter Serve Flow
flows.description: Complete flow from kitchen marking order as ready to waiter confirming food has been served to the table.

steps.action: Chef finishes cooking and taps 'Siap Diantar' on the order card in Kitchen Display
steps.result: Order status changes to 'ready'. MUST push notification to appState.kitchenReadyNotifications array: { orderId, tableNumber, items, timestamp }. Order card moves to 'Ready' column.

steps.action: Waiter navigates to Daftar Pesanan. Notification bar at top shows all items in kitchenReadyNotifications: 'Meja [X] - Pesanan Siap!' with items and 'Sudah Diantar' button. Also, the order card in active list updates status badge to 'Siap'.
steps.result: Notification is prominent and visible. Order card badge reflects new status.

steps.action: Waiter brings food to the table and taps 'Sudah Diantar' on the notification
steps.result: Notification removed from array. Order status changes to 'served'. Order card badge updates to 'Disajikan'.

flows.prototype_state_flow: CRITICAL for single-page prototype: S-006 and S-002 share appState. When chef taps 'Siap Diantar' on S-006, the order object in appState.orders must update status='ready' AND push to appState.kitchenReadyNotifications[]. When S-002 renders, it reads kitchenReadyNotifications[] to show the notification bar. Both screens react to the same state.

flows.name: Add Items to Existing Order
flows.description: Customer at a table with active order wants to add more items.

steps.action: Waiter finds the active order for the table and taps 'Tambah Item'
steps.result: Opens S-003 in 'Tambah Pesanan' mode with table pre-selected and existing items shown

steps.action: Waiter sees 'Pesanan Sebelumnya' section showing existing items. Selects additional menu items from the grid.
steps.result: New items added to order summary sidebar, labeled as 'Tambahan'

steps.action: Waiter confirms and sends the additional items
steps.result: New items appended to existing order. Kitchen receives additional items with 'Tambahan' badge on the same order card. Order total recalculated.

flows.name: Void Paid Transaction
flows.description: Cashier needs to void a transaction that has already been paid (e.g., customer complaint, wrong order charged).
flows.trigger: Error discovered after payment or customer disputes charge

steps.action: Cashier finds the paid order and opens transaction detail
steps.result: Transaction detail shown with 'Void Transaksi' button

steps.action: Cashier taps 'Void Transaksi'. System requests PIN verification.
steps.result: PIN gate modal appears

steps.action: Cashier enters correct PIN
steps.result: Void form opens

steps.action: Cashier selects void type (full/partial), selects mandatory reason, adds optional notes
steps.result: Void amount and cash impact displayed

steps.action: Cashier confirms void
steps.result: Transaction marked as voided. Cash expected in shift reduced by void amount. Void logged for audit. Owner can see in reports.
